{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221900144B3FD47850024F3C8ED9"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7548020548828250942","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事精彩紧凑，作者文笔也不错。但一共150多章，到第80多章才点题，虽然前面的故事也很不错，总给人一种头重脚轻的感觉，个人觉得，但是整体故事都很精彩"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757412617,"group_id":"7515780344524590104","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一步一个脚印慢慢来吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9LfWOxU6zfgOO8xznSTs4E=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/421ccf5f0fd04823919e665f4af777ab~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707988&x-signature=uA7WidBAzBhYVx9PbMyCYB5Xv0Y%3D","user_id":"778087745723245","user_name":"噜啦啦队长"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"778087745723245","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7515780344524590104","book_info":{"abstract":"【养鬼妻+开阴眼+住凶宅+扎纸人＋送阴棺+引黄泉】已完结
从我住进那间顶楼出租屋的第一天，怪事就接连不断，穿着红色高跟鞋的长发女人，满头花白的暴躁老太婆，被吊死的红衣小女孩，头大身短的畸形女婴，水晶棺材里的陈年腐尸，一桩桩扑朔迷离的恐怖事件让我越陷越深……
我叫杨鹏，24岁那年，我被一个女人喜欢上，算命的说她是我的福星，可没几个月，媳妇变鬼妻，从凶宅住到纸铺，为了逆天改命，我投入道家御儡门，一入儡门深似海，从此便是阴界人。
